old_value: {"id":"broadside-e37d.10","title":"RSS/Atom feed poller","description":"Tokio task that polls configured [[feed]] entries on their poll_interval. Parse RSS 2.0 and Atom 1.0. Entry-to-Note mapping: title → bold first line, description/content:encoded → body (sanitized via ammonia), enclosure/media:content with image MIME → attachment, link → footer link, id/guid → source_ref for dedup. Content cap: 5000 chars after sanitization, truncate with read-more link. Persist last_seen_id in feed_state table.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:38:52.498676946Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T22:38:52.498676946Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"broadside-e37d.10","depends_on_id":"broadside-e37d","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:38:52.505267665Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"broadside-e37d.10","depends_on_id":"broadside-e37d.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:39:19.959156741Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"broadside-e37d.10","depends_on_id":"broadside-e37d.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:39:19.993322172Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: RSS/Atom poller, webhook endpoint, directory watcher all implemented. Sanitization via ammonia, markdown via pulldown-cmark.
